posts.author: shay.butran (shay butran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I get this message when I try to send a request via API:
Complexity budget exhausted, query cost 4173020 budget remaining 999819 out of 1000000 reset in 41 seconds.
As I saw in your documentation, I have 10M Complexity points (my account is not free or trial).
Please fix it, thanks!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @shay.butran,

Please send this information in this form adding your account’s ID or name so we can take a look into it

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Could you post your query as well? A single query that size seems a bit out of line.
